meaning: n.主人,雇主,(男)教师,熟练技工,师傅,大师,硕士,<称呼>少爷adj.主人的,熟练的,高明的,主要的vt.征服,控制,精通
examples: Students are expected to master a second language.
Upstairs, the master bedroom has a walk-in wardrobe.
He is a master of disguise.
She also received a master's degree in news and documentary film from New York University.
University degree (preferably at master's level) in the field of Information Technology or related disciplines.
